title: Huawei AP162E - WiFi6 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna
description: The Huawei eKitEngine AP162E is a compact and powerful indoor access point (AP) designed according to the Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) standard, providing fast and reliable wireless connectivity with data transfer speeds of up to 2.975 Gbps . It supports simultaneous transmission on 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) and 5 GHz (2x2 MIMO) frequencies, enabling smooth connections for multiple devices. Max. number of access users is 128, Huawei's recommendation is up to 64. With its slim design, it is ideal for… This access point is equipped with one Gigabit uplink port and one Gigabit downlink port , providing flexible connectivity options. It can be mounted into a wall box, ensuring discreet installation. Its small size and easy installation make the AP162E an excellent choice for quickly establishing an indoor wireless network The management and maintenance of the AP162E can be done locally through EasyWeb or a local controller (WAC) , or remotely via the HUAWEI eKit App and SNC platform. This makes deployment and management of access points simple and efficient, significantly easing network operation and maintenance The MU-MIMO technology allows simultaneous data transmission to multiple devices, maximizing radio spectrum utilization and enhancing network performance in high-density device environments. Support for 160 MHz bandwidth and 1024-QAM modulation enables speeds of up to 575 Mbps (2.4 GHz) and 2.4 Gbps (5 GHz), providing fast and stable connectivity for all users Advanced security features include authentication and encryption methods such as WPA3, WPA2, and 802.1X, ensuring maximum data…
specsSearch: Wireless features Maximum modulation 1024 QAM Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11a, 802.11ac, 802.11b/g, 802.11ac - wave2, 802.11ax MU-MIMO Yes Transmission speed - 5GHz [Mb/s] 2402 Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 574 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 20 Tx power 5GHz [dBm] 20 Security WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 2 x 2 5GHz MIMO 2 x 2 Type of antenna Built-in Roaming Yes Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 2 Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Max. power consumption [W] 9 Physical characteristics Purpose Indoor Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 40 Weight [g] 140 Width [mm] 86 Height [mm] 86 Depth [mm] 43 Software Operating mode Access Point IPv6 support Yes
